data.content:
Plan:
1. Update overview grouping/rendering so the full tab count still includes all non-lease beats, but the active tab renders only non-empty groups. If every group is empty, render a compact tab-level empty state instead of zero-count columns.
2. Add a measured scrollport/container width hook or equivalent DOM measurement in the overview component. Compute column width as clamp(min, floor(availableWidth / (visibleColumnCount + 1)), max), and feed it into the grid auto-column style so it updates with tab changes and resize.
3. Reduce overview tile type scale by one notch: id/meta/lease/repo text from 10px to 9px, title from xs to 11px, badges/pills down one notch where practical. Keep layout stable and legible.
4. Make column state labels smaller and wrappable: allow normal whitespace, leading text preserved, left aligned, fixed header height removed or increased enough for two lines.
5. Extend focused tests for hiding empty groups while retaining tab counts/routing and dynamic helper behavior if extracted; verify with browser metrics for visible column count, width formula, tabs, and no desktop/mobile page overflow.

Complexity: medium-small UI refinement.
Risks: very few visible columns could become too wide without max bounds; many columns could become too narrow without min bounds. Use clamp boundaries and verify in Work Items and Terminated tabs.
